title: opt_rmdff incorrectly removes register
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`./yosys -p "proc; dff2dffe; simplemap; opt; opt_rmdff; stat" dffnp.v`

```
module top(input clk, d, output reg q);
wire ce = 1'b1;
always @(negedge clk)
    if (ce) q <= d;
endmodule
```

## Expected behavior

`$_DFFE_NP_` cell remaining.

## Actual behavior

```
6. Executing OPT_RMDFF pass (remove dff with constant values).
Removing $auto$simplemap.cc:442:simplemap_dffe$12 ($_DFFE_NP_) from module top.
Replaced 1 DFF cells.
```
code_blocks:
6. Executing OPT_RMDFF pass (remove dff with constant values).
Removing $auto$simplemap.cc:442:simplemap_dffe$12 ($_DFFE_NP_) from module top.
Replaced 1 DFF cells.
